flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the manifests/ directory?
flashcards.back: Contains AndroidManifest.xml which declares app components, permissions, and metadata to the Android system.

flashcards.front: How do you access string resources in code?
What types of files go in res/values/?
flashcards.back: XML files defining strings, colors, dimensions, styles, and arrays.

flashcards.front: What is the difference between res/drawable/ and res/mipmap/?
flashcards.back: drawable/ for general images, mipmap/ specifically for launcher icons (better scaling).
An auto-generated class that contains resource IDs for all resources in the res/ directory.
